LanguageData.Charged.label: charge
LanguageData.Charged.description: The charged particle coating disrupts armor and tissue in equal measure.
LanguageData.ChargedAP.label: concentrated charge
LanguageData.ChargedAP.description: Focuses charged particles around the tip of the core for improved armor penetration at the cost of stopping power.
LanguageData.Ionized.label: ion charge
LanguageData.Ionized.description: Designed to combat mechanoids, the round creates an electrical current on impact, disrupting electronic systems temporarily.
LanguageData.Laser.label: laser
LanguageData.Laser.description: A concentrated beam or bolt of radiation, imparting disruptive energy into the target.
LanguageData.Laser_Mech.label: laser (mech)
LanguageData.Laser_Mech.description: A concentrated beam or bolt of radiation, imparting disruptive energy into the target.
LanguageData.IncendiaryFuel.label: incendiary
LanguageData.IncendiaryFuel.description: Filled with incendiary agent that ignites after impact.
LanguageData.NapalmFuel.label: jellied chemfuel
LanguageData.NapalmFuel.description: Highly flammable liquid, burns over time and catches nearby objects on fire.
LanguageData.JelliedPrometheumFuel.label: jellied prometheum
LanguageData.JelliedPrometheumFuel.description: Advanced pyrophoric compound in gel-form. Self-ignites on contact with air, sticks to skin and seeps into openings, burning even mechanoids.
LanguageData.Bioferrite.label: bioferrite
LanguageData.Bioferrite.description: An infusion of crystalline bioferrite attacks organic matter on a cellular level, disrupting regeneration and weakening tisue.
LanguageData.ThermobaricFuel.label: thermobaric
LanguageData.ThermobaricFuel.description: Filled with high-explosive aerosol that causes a large explosion and ignites flammable materials.
LanguageData.FoamFuel.label: foam
LanguageData.FoamFuel.description: Special round designed for civilian fire-fighting purposes. Filled with fire-retardant foam to suppress fires in a large area.
LanguageData.Antigrain.label: antigrain warhead
LanguageData.Antigrain.description: A tiny ultra-tech warhead usually used by spacecraft or glitterworld war machines. Powered by a grain of antimatter, it creates a huge explosion and starts fires around the target.
LanguageData.RadiationIonising.label: radiation
LanguageData.RadiationIonising.description: Contains ionising gamma radiation that significantly impairs consciousness, and is a carcinogen.
LanguageData.ForsakenArrow.label: forsaken arrow
LanguageData.ForsakenArrow.description: Designed to be fired from a forsaken bow.
LanguageData.Plasma.label: Plasma
LanguageData.Plasma.description: Highly-energized ionized gas capable of devastating burn effects.
LanguageData.RailgunSabot.label: Railgun sabot
LanguageData.RailgunSabot.description: Uses a discarding sabot to fire an undersized projectile at higher muzzle velocities, greatly improving armor penetration.
LanguageData.NanobotsMT.label: nanobots (MT)
LanguageData.NanobotsMT.description: The nanobots inside this projectile will create a micro-turret near the place of impact.
LanguageData.Standard.label: Standard
LanguageData.Standard.description: A gyro-stabilized projectile equipped with a hardened tip for penetrating armor and laden with a small explosive charge.
LanguageData.Inferno.label: Inferno
LanguageData.Inferno.description: A gyro-stabilized projectile equipped with the explosive filler replaced with sticky, highly flammable prometheum.
LanguageData.MetalStorm.label: Metal Storm
LanguageData.MetalStorm.description: A gyro-stabilized equipped with a proximity fuse, designed to shower lighly armored targets with a devestating shower of fragmention when it detonates.
LanguageData.Kraken.label: Kraken
LanguageData.Kraken.description: A gyro-stabilized projectile with hardened penetrator and explosive 'kicker' charge, designed to punch through heavy armor.
LanguageData.Tempest.label: Tempest
LanguageData.Tempest.description: A gyro-stabilized projectile carrying a plasma shock generator that is effective against machines.
LanguageData.Melta.label: Melta
LanguageData.Melta.description: A concentrated beam of scorching plasma, capable of reducing even the heaviest of armor to molten slag.
LanguageData.BlasterStandard.label: blaster
LanguageData.BlasterStandard.description: Energy bolts created with tibanna gas. Causes neat punctures and burns that tend to carbonize and char. Low chance of wound infection.
LanguageData.BlasterStun.label: stun
LanguageData.BlasterStun.description: Low-energy bolts created with tibanna gas. Temporarily stuns and incapacitates the target.
LanguageData.BlasterAP.label: concentrated tibanna
LanguageData.BlasterAP.description: Energy bolts created with tibanna gas. Causes neat punctures and burns that tend to carbonize and char. Low chance of wound infection. Spun to a higher pressure to create bolts with improved penetration, at the loss of wounding potential.
LanguageData.BlasterIonized.label: ionized tibanna
LanguageData.BlasterIonized.description: Energy bolts created with tibanna gas. Causes neat punctures and burns that tend to carbonize and char. Low chance of wound infection. Ionized during the firing process to cause extra damage to droids and mechanoids, at the cost of reduced lethality against organics.
LanguageData.SWRocketPlasma.label: hi-energy plasma charge
LanguageData.SWRocketPlasma.description: A compressed plasma charge produces a powerful armour-penetrating explosion, along with a concentrated secondary blast. Lacks fragmentation effects, unlike earlier warhead designs, limiting effective radius.
LanguageData.MiniRocketAPHEF.label: armor-piercing high-explosive fragmentation
LanguageData.MiniRocketAPHEF.description: Rocket-assisted fin-stabilized explosive projectiles that penetrate, then explode. Deadly against hard and soft targets alike, with secondary fragmentation over a wide area.
LanguageData.MiniRocketEMP.label: armor-piercing electromagnetized
LanguageData.MiniRocketEMP.description: Rocket-assisted fin-stabilized electromagnetically-cored projectiles that penetrate, then overwhelm the target's electronics with a concentrated electromagnetic pulse. Devastating against robotic targets and energy shields.
LanguageData.MiniRocketIncendiary.label: high-explosive incendiary
LanguageData.MiniRocketIncendiary.description: Rocket-assisted fin-stabilized explosive projectiles that penetrate, then explode in an incendiary fireball.
LanguageData.MiniRocketPierce.label: heavy armor-piercing
LanguageData.MiniRocketPierce.description: Rocket-assisted fin-stabilized projectiles that penetrate, with no secondary explosion. For situations where splash damage is undesirable.
